name: Corrupted
summary: The Corrupted are mixed-origin units controlled by Orokin Void defenses and are common in the Void.
description: Composite hostile faction formed from other factions under Void control.

recommendedStatusPlan: Favor flexible generalist builds because corrupted compositions mix defense types.
Use benchmark targets like Corrupted Heavy Gunner to test armor handling.
cautions: Specialized anti-shield or anti-armor setups can underperform against mixed rooms.
Void-aligned mixed rosters reward flexible all-rounder builds over narrow counters.

notes: Corrupted matchup logic should lean toward adaptable all-rounder recommendations.
